comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Starting critical remediation for SNYK-JS-IMMUTABLE-15423650 (immutable). I will update package constraints/lockfile in dashboard and run the dashboard test/lint checks needed to validate dependency integrity.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text:
Progress update:
- Added targeted override in dashboard/package.json:
  - overrides.sass.immutable = ^4.3.8
- Regenerated lockfile with: npm install --package-lock-only
- Dependency verification:
  - npm ls immutable --all
  - Result shows immutable@4.3.8 at top-level path (prior vulnerable 4.3.7 path removed); immutable@3.7.6 remains nested under relay-compiler where required by that package line.
- Test validation:
  - npm run test -- --runInBand components/ui/__tests__/confidence-formatting.test.ts
  - Result: 1 suite passed, 17 tests passed.
